name: audit log entry from pr-corpus learning is included in the merkle chain hash next checkpoint
command: mkdir -p compliance pr-corpus && printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --audit-log compliance/audit.log 2>err.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/checkpoint.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --out compliance/checkpoint.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"merkle_root"' compliance/checkpoint.json && grep -q '"included_events":1' compliance/checkpoint.json && echo ok 1>&2
